summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Arithmetic Expressions in mathematics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 7 mathematics explains the core concepts of Arithmetic Expressions. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
